currentLinkedIn.headline: Research Scientist at NUS | NLP · Multilingual Models · 40+ Publications | Singapore
currentLinkedIn.about: I study how large language models process low-resource languages. Eight years in NLP research — I have 40+ peer-reviewed publications and collaborate with industry labs to bridge research and deployment.

experience.title: Research Scientist
bullets: Led research programme on cross-lingual transfer learning covering 14 Southeast Asian languages
Published 12 first-author papers at ACL, EMNLP, and NAACL; work cited 1,400+ times
Supervised 6 PhD students and managed a lab of 18 researchers and engineers

experience.title: Postdoctoral Researcher
bullets: Developed a multilingual benchmark for evaluating zero-shot transfer in 30 languages
Collaborated with Google Research on a joint publication on efficient multilingual fine-tuning
